events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes worn sheave grooves where belts are riding low - this is an installed-defective condition. Worn sheave grooves cause belts to ride low in the groove, reducing contact area and grip, leading to slippage, premature belt wear, and reduced power transmission efficiency. This is out of tolerance per manufacturer guides.

Let me construct the JSON response.
